title: Calculus — Series
description: Taylor, geometric series, and convergence tests flowchart.

blocks.title: Common tests
blocks.markdown:
| Test | Use when |
|------|----------|
| Ratio | Factorials / exp |
| Root | nth powers |
| Alternating | (-1)^n terms |
| Comparison | Positive terms |

blocks.title: Convergence checklist
blocks.mermaid:
flowchart TD
  A[Identify a_n] --> B{Absolute?}
  B -->|Yes| C[Ratio / root / compare]
  B -->|Alternating| D[AST]
  C --> E[Interval of conv.]
  D --> E
